S.FORM: Mikawci Kung'yu avan tiribi dorama i taiwan. inalang tua tiribi na kacalisian. == kaizuan ==
S.PHON: mikawʦi kuŋʔju avan tiribi durama i taiwan. inaɭaŋ tua tiribi na kaʦaɭisian. == kaizuan ==
S.FORM: Mikawci Kung'yu avan tiribi dorama i taiwan. inalang tua tiribi na kacalisian. == kaizuan ==
S.PHON: mikawʦi kuŋʔju avan tiribi durama i taiwan. inaɭaŋ tua tiribi na kaʦaɭisian. == kaizuan ==
